chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1950 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.06.2022 Mr. Abdul Majid Mengal, advocate for petitioner Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G Sindh Additional Director General Law ECP (Khurram Shahzad), Law Officer ECP (Zaheer Abbas) & Regional Election Commissioner Hyderabad(Ali Abdullah Khalid) *** Learned counsel for the petitioner states that nomination papers of petitioner were rejected on the basis that one of his seconder and proposer was not a voter from same constituency. This being the case, we do not find any reason to interfere with the impugned order dated 26.05.2022 in view of Section 60 of the Election Act, 2017 and as such this petition is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
